parents.subject: LU-15425 utils: 'lfs migrate' can accept FIDs

commit.subject: LU-15425 utils: lfs_migrate script can accept FID
commit.message:
LU-15425 utils: lfs_migrate script can accept FID

If --lustre-dir <lustre_dir> and --fid options are specified
at the same time, lfs_migrate script can accept FID(s) on command
line.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Lei Feng <flei@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: If726e9da35c7c3d35744aac2ee2710456c36d79b
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/58260
Reviewed-by: Olaf Faaland <faaland1@llnl.gov>
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
